Note: 400 Followers Special. Part 1 of 2. Thank you so much for your Support. Q///Q

Title
Why Have One Maid When You Can Have Two?

Story
You had no idea what was coming your way. You were enjoying a pleasant afternoon when, suddenly, there was a loud knock at your door. To your surprise, Acheron and Kafka were standing there, each with bags so large they could easily hide several children. Their intentions were clear and straightforward: they sought your love and affection. It was now time to resolve this once and for all.

Why not Both?
